description: 50 clear Capgemini consulting & delivery IT helpdesk scenarios (Set CG)

cases.title: Cannot Login to Capgemini MyWizard Portal
cases.description: Cannot login to Capgemini MyWizard employee portal after password reset. Self-service portal shows 'Invalid credentials'. Need access to submit weekly timesheet before Friday cutoff.

cases.title: Client VPN FortiClient Connection Failed Error 201
cases.description: FortiClient VPN to client Barclays environment fails with Error 201 authentication failed. Required for sprint demo with client stakeholders at 3 PM IST.

cases.title: Ransomware Detected on Project Laptop
cases.description: Security incident: CrowdStrike detected ransomware encryption on developer laptop. Project source code folder files renamed with .encrypted extension. Machine isolated from network.

cases.title: Company Laptop Screen Flickering After Dock Connect
cases.description: Capgemini-issued laptop screen flickers when connected to USB-C dock. Undocked display is fine. Affects daily client standup presentations.

cases.title: SAP S4HANA Transport Import Failed in QA
cases.description: SAP S4HANA transport import failed in client QA system with error 'Import cancelled due to object lock'. Blocking UAT sign-off for finance module.

cases.title: PostgreSQL Connection Pool Exhausted on Microservice
cases.description: PostgreSQL connection pool exhausted on client-order-service. API returning HTTP 500 errors. All 50 connections in use, no idle connections available.

cases.title: New Contractor Okta and Jira Provisioning
cases.description: New contractor joining client agile team Monday — need Okta SSO account, Jira project access, Confluence space, and client VPN profile per onboarding form ONB-CG-331.

cases.title: Floor Printer Paper Jam Cannot Print Deliverable
cases.description: HP printer on Bangalore EPIP campus Floor 5 has paper jam. Red jam light on, print queue stuck with 12 documents including client status report.

cases.title: Microsoft Teams Breakout Rooms Not Working
cases.description: Microsoft Teams breakout rooms fail to open during client workshop. Organizer sees 'Something went wrong' error. Main meeting audio works fine.

cases.title: Firewall Whitelist Client API Endpoint Port 8443
cases.description: Need firewall rule to whitelist client API endpoint payments.clientcorp.com on port 8443 from Capgemini dev subnet. Approved in change request CR-CG-2290.

cases.title: Phishing Email Mimicking Capgemini HR Payroll
cases.description: Security incident: multiple consultants received phishing email mimicking Capgemini HR payroll with malicious link. Four employees clicked before IT broadcast warning.

cases.title: Oracle Database Tablespace ORADATA 97 Percent Full
cases.description: Oracle database ORADATA tablespace at 97% on client production DB. Batch jobs failing with ORA-01653. Client SLA breach risk for nightly processing.

cases.title: Resigned Consultant Revoke All Client Access
cases.description: Consultant resigned effective today — immediate offboarding: disable AD, revoke Okta, client VPN, GitHub org, Jira, and ServiceNow access per HR exit ticket.

cases.title: Campus Wi-Fi Authentication Failing Pune Hinjewadi
cases.description: Corporate Wi-Fi at Pune Hinjewadi campus rejects valid credentials with 'Authentication server timeout'. Wired port on same desk works normally.

cases.title: Salesforce Lightning Page Blank After Sandbox Refresh
cases.description: Salesforce Lightning Experience loads blank white page after client sandbox refresh. Classic view works when switched manually. Affects CRM demo for client.

cases.title: Laptop Battery Drains to Zero in 30 Minutes
cases.description: Company laptop battery drains from 100% to 0% in 30 minutes even when plugged in. Power adapter connected, charging LED flickers. Need replacement for client site visit.

cases.title: Production API Keys Exposed in GitLab Repository
cases.description: Security incident: GitLab secret detection found production AWS access keys in client project repository. Merge request was approved by 3 reviewers before alert.

cases.title: MongoDB Replica Set Secondary Not Syncing
cases.description: MongoDB replica set secondary node stuck in RECOVERING state. Primary node healthy but read queries failing on secondary. Client reporting dashboard stale.

cases.title: ServiceNow Incident Form Submit Button Spins
cases.description: ServiceNow incident form submit spins indefinitely after filling all mandatory fields. No error message. Other ServiceNow modules load correctly in same session.

cases.title: MFA Authenticator Lost Need Device Re-Enrollment
cases.description: Lost phone with Microsoft Authenticator MFA app. Cannot login to corporate email or client VPN until new device enrolled. Manager confirmed identity via HR.

cases.title: MPLS Circuit Down Mumbai to Client Data Center
cases.description: MPLS WAN circuit between Mumbai delivery center and client data center down since 7 AM IST. Offshore team cannot reach client staging environment.

cases.title: Docker Desktop Won't Start After Windows Update
cases.description: Docker Desktop fails to start with WSL2 error after Windows 11 KB update. Needed for local container development on client microservices project.

cases.title: USB Headset Microphone Not Working on Teams Calls
cases.description: Jabra USB headset microphone not detected in Microsoft Teams calls. Headset works in Windows sound settings test. Colleagues cannot hear me on client calls.

cases.title: Snowflake Warehouse Suspended Credit Quota Hit
cases.description: Snowflake analytics warehouse WH_CLIENT suspended — credit quota exhausted. Client ETL pipelines and Tableau dashboards failing since midnight batch run.

cases.title: Unauthorized RDP Login From Foreign IP Address
cases.description: Security incident: SIEM alert shows successful RDP login to project jump server from IP 185.220.101.47 at 2:30 AM IST. No approved travel for that user.

cases.title: Power BI Report Refresh Failed Gateway Offline
cases.description: On-premises Power BI data gateway shows offline in Power BI Service. All client dashboards failed scheduled refresh since 6 AM IST.

cases.title: NetApp Snapshot Restore for Deleted Project Files
cases.description: Client project files accidentally deleted from NetApp NAS share. Need snapshot restore from last night 11 PM before client audit on Thursday.

cases.title: Intune Device Non-Compliant Blocking Outlook Mobile
cases.description: Intune marks iPhone as non-compliant — Outlook mobile cannot sync email. Device encryption on but policy shows false positive jailbreak detection.

cases.title: DHCP Scope Exhausted Floor 8 Bangalore Campus
cases.description: Users on Bangalore EPIP campus Floor 8 report 'No IP address assigned'. DHCP scope 10.28.0.0/24 shows zero available leases since morning.

cases.title: Jenkins CI Pipeline Maven Build Failing
cases.description: Jenkins CI pipeline for client payment microservice failing at Maven compile step. Dependency resolution error. Last successful build 3 days ago.

cases.title: Smart Badge Denied at Mumbai Office Main Gate
cases.description: Employee smart badge denied at Mumbai Airoli campus main gate turnstile with red LED. Badge works for cafeteria but not building entry since reissue.

cases.title: Redis Cache Cluster Node Down Connection Timeout
cases.description: Redis cluster node redis-cache-03 down. Application logs show connection timeouts. API latency increased from 200ms to 5 seconds on client portal.

cases.title: Laptop Blue Screen MEMORY_MANAGEMENT After Update
cases.description: Company laptop BSOD with stop code MEMORY_MANAGEMENT after Windows update. Cannot boot into Windows. Need urgent replacement for client workshop tomorrow.

cases.title: Azure DevOps Pipeline Release Stuck Deploying
cases.description: Azure DevOps release pipeline stuck at 'Deploying to staging' for 4 hours. No error in logs. Client UAT environment unreachable from pipeline agent.

cases.title: DLP Alert Sensitive Client Data in Email Attachment
cases.description: Security incident: DLP flagged email with client PII data sent to personal Gmail address. Employee attached customer database export by mistake.

cases.title: Cisco AnyConnect VPN Error 807 From Home Office
cases.description: Cisco AnyConnect VPN fails with Error 807 from home office. Cannot reach Capgemini internal tools or client staging server. Internet works fine.

cases.title: SharePoint Document Library Upload Fails Large File
cases.description: SharePoint client project site upload fails at 95% for 1.5GB deliverable archive. Error 'Something went wrong'. Smaller files upload successfully.

cases.title: Dual Monitor Second Screen Not Detected on Dock
cases.description: Second Dell monitor not detected when laptop connected to USB-C dock. Display settings show one screen only. Needed for dual-screen client development.

cases.title: MySQL Replication Lag 4 Hours on Reporting DB
cases.description: MySQL replication lag 4 hours on client reporting replica. MIS dashboards showing stale data. SQL thread running but relay log apply slow.

cases.title: Grant Jira Admin Access for Project Lead
cases.description: Project lead needs Jira administrator access for client project board per approved ServiceNow request. Temporary 30-day elevation with manager sign-off.

cases.title: Kafka Consumer Lag 500K Messages Trade Feed
cases.description: Apache Kafka consumer group lag exceeding 500,000 messages on client trade-feed topic. Downstream analytics not receiving real-time data.

cases.title: Veeam Backup Job Failed Repository Out of Space
cases.description: Veeam backup job Nightly-VM-Client failed — backup repository volume full. Last successful backup 5 days ago. Client DR compliance at risk.

cases.title: Webex Desktop One-Way Audio on Client Call
cases.description: Cisco Webex desktop — client hears me but I cannot hear them on daily scrum. Webex browser version has two-way audio on same laptop.

cases.title: PCI Card Numbers Found in Application Debug Logs
cases.description: Security incident: Splunk detected full credit card numbers in payment service debug logs on app-pay-stg-01. Debug logging left enabled in staging.

cases.title: Internal DNS Not Resolving client.corp.local
cases.description: Users cannot resolve client.corp.local hostnames since 10 AM IST. External websites load fine. Affects client API integration testing.

cases.title: AutoCAD License Checkout Failed FlexLM Timeout
cases.description: AutoCAD 2024 license checkout failed — FlexLM server timeout. Cannot open client architectural drawings for review. Server ping succeeds.

cases.title: Zebra Label Printer Offline in Project Lab
cases.description: Zebra ZT410 label printer shows offline in Windows. Project lab cannot print shipping labels for client hardware deployment.

cases.title: Elasticsearch Cluster Red Status Shard Unassigned
cases.description: Elasticsearch cluster status RED — 12 unassigned shards on client search index. Product search API returning empty results on client e-commerce portal.

cases.title: Citrix VDI Published App Disconnects Every 15 Min
cases.description: Citrix Workspace published client SAP app disconnects every 15 minutes with 'Connection to server lost'. Other published apps work normally.

cases.title: SSL Certificate Expired on Client Portal Staging
cases.description: Security incident: client staging portal shows NET::ERR_CERT_DATE_INVALID. SSL certificate expired yesterday. Client UAT testing blocked.
